Name: Vine Leaves
description: Grape leaves stuffed with rice, herbs, and sometimes meat.

Name: Kofta
description: Spiced minced meat shaped into balls or skewers.

Name: Manoushe
description: Flatbread topped with herbs, cheese, or meat.

Name: Baba Ghanoush
description: Smoky mashed eggplant with tahini, garlic, and lemon.

Name: Tabouli
description: Fresh salad with parsley, tomato, bulgur, and lemon.

Name: Kibbeh
description: Ground meat mixed with bulgur and spices, often fried.
